title: Google WorkSpace for NYU
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Google WorkSpace for NYU
NYU uses Google Workspace (formerly G Suite) for Education, which includes NYU Email, Calendar, Groups, Drive, Sites and more.
To whom are these services available?
The NYU community, including admitted and enrolled degree students, current and retired employees, alumni, and sponsored affiliates.
How can users access this service?
Users can access Google Workspace apps for NYU via NYUHome
Need help?
Submit a request on support.nyu.edu
Send a request through WeChat
Email to shanghai.it.help@nyu.edu
Visit the IT Service Center: Room N525 @ New Bund Campus
FAQs and more
Activating NYU Email, Calendar and other Workspace Services
Desktop application and mobile device setup
General FAQs
Mobile FAQ
Basic Troubleshooting FAQs
Tutorials at LinkedIn Learning
Create Email Group/Alias for NYU Shanghai
Find more KB article on support.nyu.edu
